title: Fix ticket detail API response wrapper handling
description: Three CLI commands (get, artifact, bundle) expected the ticket detail API to return flat data, but the backend wraps it in { ticket: {...} }. This fix unwraps the response in all three files.

steps.title: Add TicketResponse wrapper type
steps.description: Added `type TicketResponse = { ticket: TicketDetail }` to match the actual API response shape where the ticket object is nested under a `ticket` key.

steps.title: Unwrap ticket from response
steps.description: Changed from casting directly to TicketDetail to casting to TicketResponse and extracting `data.ticket`. This fixes the 'Cannot read properties of undefined' error when accessing reporter.name.

steps.title: Add TicketResponse type for artifact command
steps.description: Same wrapper type added here. The artifact command fetches ticket detail to resolve the latest run ID when --run is not provided.

steps.title: Unwrap ticket in artifact run resolution
steps.description: Changed to extract `resp.ticket` before accessing `currentRun` and `runs[0]` for automatic run ID resolution.

steps.title: Add TicketResponse type for bundle command
steps.description: Bundle also fetches ticket detail to get the run ID and write ticket.json. Same wrapper fix applied.

steps.title: Unwrap ticket in bundle fetch
steps.description: Changed to extract `resp.ticket` so the bundle writes the actual ticket data to ticket.json and correctly resolves the run ID.
